steps.title: Isolate the variable term
steps.content: Start with 4x + 1 = 33. Subtract 1 from both sides to get 4x = 32. This equation has the same solution set as the original since we performed a reversible operation.

steps.title: Match against the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: 4x = 32. This is exactly what we derived. Works.
  • Choice B: 4x = 5 gives x = 1.25, while the original gives x = 8. Eliminated.
  • Choice C: 4x = 1 gives x = 0.25, not 8. Eliminated.
  • Choice D: 4x = -32 gives x = -8, not 8. Eliminated.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
